iPhone 12

SThe iPhone 12, released in October 2020, features a 6.1-inch Super Retina XDR OLED display, A14 Bionic chip, 5G connectivity, and a dual 12MP camera system.

Kshs. 40,000 only.

Purchase
MacBook Air M5

Released in March 2026, the MacBook Air with M5 chip features a 10-core CPU with the world's fastest core, providing up to 4x faster AI performance than M4 models. Available in 13.6-inch and 15.3-inch sizes, it boasts a fanless, thin design with up to 18 hours of battery life, starting from $1,099 with 512GB storage and 16GB RAM..

Kshs. 250,000 only

Purchase
Calculator

Curved and shapely desk calculator with dual power (solar and battery). The sides of the calculator are contrasting in colour and form a pleasant contrast. The flat keys of the calculator are printed in matching colours. The display shows 10 digits and the battery is included.

Kshs. 27,750 only

Purchase
